diagrams.title: Industrial Revolutions Timeline
diagrams.description: A horizontal timeline showing four industrial revolutions with key technologies and time periods
elements: 1870 - Second IR: Electricity, Oil, Mass Production
2010 - Fourth IR: AI, IoT, Cyber-Physical Systems
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the chronological evolution and key technologies of each revolution

diagrams.title: Environmental Impact Flow
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing how industrialization causes environmental degradation
elements: Resource Extraction → Manufacturing → Distribution → Consumption → Disposal
Arrow pointing from Disposal back to Resource Extraction showing circular flow
Environmental impacts listed: Pollution, Waste, Emissions at each stage
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the complete lifecycle and environmental consequences of industrial processes

diagrams.title: Green IT Framework
diagrams.description: Concentric circles representing different layers of Green IT implementation
elements: Inner circle: Energy Efficiency (power management, efficient hardware)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the multi-layered approach to implementing Green IT practices

diagrams.title: Circular Economy Model
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing continuous flow of materials in a sustainable economy
elements: Design → Production → Distribution → Use → Collection → Recycling → Raw Materials → Back to Design
Labels: Zero Waste, Resource Efficiency, Sustainability at different points
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the closed-loop system that minimizes waste and maximizes resource utilization
